description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of muted green, brown, and mustard yellow tones. The upper is constructed from a mix of suede and leather panels, with perforations on the toe box for breathability. The shoe has mustard yellow laces and a matching swoosh logo on the side, as well as a padded collar for comfort. The outsole is made of rubber with a textured tread in a mustard yellow color, and the midsole is white, providing contrast and cushioning. The heel area displays the brand name in large, bold letters. The overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A stylish low-top sneaker in green, brown, and mustard yellow with suede and leather panels, yellow laces, and a bold side swoosh.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the padded heel, large brand lettering, and the yellow outsole.
description_view_1: Front-side view highlighting the perforated toe box, yellow laces, and the swoosh logo.
description_view_2: Front angle emphasizing the toe box, lace arrangement, and layered panel construction.
description_view_3: Rear-side view focusing on the heel branding, swoosh, and the layered material transitions.
attribute_logo: Yellow swoosh on the side panels; 'NIKE' text on the heel in yellow.
